content.text:
I'm encountering a challenge accessing Product Hunt directly. They're using Cloudflare protection that's blocking both automated web fetches and even direct curl requests. This is a common anti-bot measure.

Here are some alternative approaches you can use to find today's top products:

## Direct Access (Recommended)
Simply visit [Product Hunt](https://www.producthunt.com/) directly in your browser and look for:
- The "Product of the Day" section (usually at the top)
- The "Today" tab which shows the top posts

## Alternative Sources

**RSS Feed:**
- URL: `https://www.producthunt.com/posts.rss`
- You can read this in any RSS reader

**Third-Party Aggregators:**
- **Hacker News Product Hunt section**: [hn.algolia.com](https://hn.algolia.com/?q=Product%20Hunt)
- **Product Hunt clones**: There are several third-party sites that aggregate PH data
- **Twitter/X**: Follow @ProductHunt for real-time updates

**Browser Method:**
If you have the OpenClaw browser extension working:
1. Click the browser relay toolbar icon on a Product Hunt tab
2. I can then help you extract and format the top products

Would you like me to try a different approach, or would you prefer to access Product Hunt directly and provide me with the details? I can then help format them into the clean markdown you requested.
